pairs.question: Which cities in Minnesota are served by area codes 507 and 924?
pairs.answer: Area codes 507 and 924 serve the southern fifth of Minnesota, including cities such as Rochester, Mankato, Worthington, Fairmont, Albert Lea, Northfield, and Austin.

pairs.question: When was area code 507 created, and what was its origin?
pairs.answer: Area code 507 was created in 1954 as the third area code in Minnesota. It was formed from the southwestern portion of area code 218 and the southern portion of area code 612.

pairs.question: What is an area code overlay, and how does it relate to area code 507?
pairs.answer: An area code overlay is when a new area code is introduced to serve the same geographic region as an existing area code. In this case, area code 924 was overlaid on area code 507 in 2024 to address the forecasted exhaustion of central office codes in 507 by 2025.

pairs.question: How did the borders of area code 507 change over time?
pairs.answer: Initially, area code 507 bordered area code 612 to the north. In the 1990s, 612 was divided, and 507 began bordering area code 320 (1996), 651 (1998), and 952 (2000). The northern border was adjusted to better link expanding communities near the Twin Cities with that region.

pairs.question: What is required for dialing within area codes 507 and 924 as of July 2024?
pairs.answer: As of July 2024, ten-digit dialing is required within area codes 507 and 924. This means callers must dial the full 10-digit phone number, including the area code, for all calls within the region.

pairs.question: When did area code 924 become assignable, and what was the process?
pairs.answer: Area code 924 became assignable on August 30, 2024. It was approved as an all-service overlay to area code 507 by the Minnesota Public Utilities Commission on March 30, 2023, following a forecasted exhaustion of central office codes in 507 by 2025.

pairs.question: Which area codes in Minnesota no longer border area code 507?
pairs.answer: Area code 612 no longer borders area code 507. 612 has been reduced to include just Minneapolis and a few surrounding suburbs.
